title: Device Settings - All toggles ON - Persist after closing tab, settings page or app
scenario: Toggle buttons in Device Settings persist ON state after closing tabs, returning to Device Home Screen, and restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Tap on a connected device to enter Device Settings
Toggle any setting (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications) to ON
Navigate back to the Home screen
Close the app completely (swipe from recents)
Navigate to the same Device Settings
expected: All toggle buttons should return to their default OFF state after closing and reopening tabs, returning to the Device Home Screen, or restarting the app.
